channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Bear attack injures 4 in Fukushima, Japan, amid rising bear population
item.description: Surveillance footage from a steel company in Fukushima, Japan, shows a bear chasing a worker and throwing him to the ground. The bear reportedly injured four people.

item.title: WATCH: Chicago-bound flight diverted after man tries to open exit door, sheriff says
item.description: The Frontier Airlines flight from Puerto Rico was forced to divert to Miami. The man also allegedly choked an off-duty flight attendant seated nearby.

item.title: Iowa Senate race set between Democrat Josh Turek and Republican Ashley Hinson
item.description: Republican Sen. Joni Ernst is not seeking reelection, and Democrats have grown increasingly optimistic about their chances of flipping the seat.

item.title: Iran live updates: Iran targets US forces and Kuwait airport amid ceasefire
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.
